# PgBouncer userlist — credentials for auth_type = scram-sha-256.
#
# Format: "username" "password"
#
# In production, replace plaintext passwords with SCRAM verifiers generated by:
#   SELECT rolname, rolpassword FROM pg_authid WHERE rolname = 'urban';
# (copy the SCRAM-SHA-256$... value and paste below)
#
# For development, plaintext passwords are accepted when auth_type = plain.
# Switch to scram-sha-256 verifiers for production.

"urban" "urban_secret"
"postgres" "postgres_secret"
